calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-23-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Off Calendar Feb-13-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Melissa Wood Eisenberg, Esq. of Murchison & Cumming, Tel. 415.524.4300, for defendant and moving party;
Michael McCloskey, Esq. of the Law Office of Michael McCloskey, Tel. 415.572.4257, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. The court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JEFFREY BALICH's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses; Request For Monetary Sanctions is granted. The motion was unopposed. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) Judge Pro Tem: James Watson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported
